transcript: Wispr Flow note: the workshop kept circling community trust, creative pressure, and the way useful signal gets buried unless we bring it back.

knowledge_base.voice.md: Keep the voice intimate, warm, direct, and source-grounded. Prefer original language over borrowed style references.

expected_originality_guardrails: Use source themes and receipts as anchors, not copied lyrics.
Avoid named artist, soundalike, and copyrighted lyric references.
Keep the pack service-agnostic and text-only; do not claim final audio.
